name: Thunderstorm
description: Dark clouds gather and thunder rumbles across the sky.

effects.narration: Rain lashes down and thunder cracks overhead.

name: Dense Fog
description: A thick fog rolls in, reducing visibility.

effects.narration: Dense fog blankets the village, muffling all sounds.

name: Traveling Merchant
description: A traveling merchant arrives at the gate with exotic wares.

effects.narration: A merchant's cart rattles through the gate, laden with unusual goods.

name: Theft Report
description: An NPC reports a theft, putting guards on alert.

effects.narration: Word spreads of a theft. The guards tighten their patrols.

name: NPC Accident
description: An NPC gets injured while working.

effects.narration: You hear a cry of pain from nearby.

name: Village Festival Preparations
description: The village prepares for a small festival.

effects.narration: Colorful bunting appears around the village center. Festival preparations are underway!

name: Supply Shortage
description: The tavern runs low on supplies.

effects.narration: Tessa frowns behind the bar. 'Running low on everything,' she mutters.

name: Lost Item
description: An NPC loses a personal item and asks for help finding it.

effects.narration: An NPC hurries past, looking distressed. 'Has anyone seen my...'
